default_meta_description: {{business_name}} — professional electrical services in {{suburb}} and surrounding areas. Licensed electrician for homes and businesses. 24/7 emergency callouts. Call {{phone}} for a free quote.
default_about_text: We're a team of licensed and experienced electricians providing reliable electrical services to homes and businesses. With years of experience and a commitment to quality workmanship, we take pride in delivering safe, compliant, and efficient electrical solutions. No job is too big or too small — from a single powerpoint to a full commercial fit-out.

services.name: Lighting Installation
services.description: Indoor and outdoor lighting design, installation, and upgrades for homes and businesses.

services.name: Powerpoint & Switchboard Upgrades
services.description: Upgrade your switchboard and add powerpoints to meet modern electrical demands safely.

services.name: Safety Inspections
services.description: Comprehensive electrical safety inspections to identify hazards and ensure compliance.

services.name: Emergency Electrical Repairs
services.description: Available 24/7 for urgent electrical faults, power outages, and safety hazards.

services.name: Ceiling Fan Installation
services.description: Professional ceiling fan supply and installation for year-round comfort.

services.name: Smoke Alarm Installation
services.description: Installation and testing of compliant smoke alarms to keep your family safe.

services.name: Commercial Electrician
services.description: Electrical fit-outs, maintenance, and compliance for offices, shops, and commercial premises.

services.name: Air Conditioning Installation
services.description: Split system and ducted air conditioning installation by a licensed electrician.

services.name: 3 Phase Power
services.description: 3 phase power installation and upgrades for workshops, machinery, and commercial equipment.

why_choose_us.title: Licensed & Fully Insured
why_choose_us.description: Fully licensed electrician with comprehensive insurance for your peace of mind.

why_choose_us.title: On Time, Every Time
why_choose_us.description: We respect your time. We show up when we say we will, or we'll let you know in advance.

why_choose_us.title: Upfront Pricing
why_choose_us.description: No hidden fees or surprise charges. You'll know the cost before any work begins.

why_choose_us.title: Clean & Tidy Work
why_choose_us.description: We leave your home or business as clean as we found it. Every time.

why_choose_us.title: 24/7 Emergency Callouts
why_choose_us.description: Electrical emergencies don't keep business hours. Neither do we.

why_choose_us.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
why_choose_us.description: We stand behind our work. If you're not happy, we'll make it right.

how_we_work.title: Send Us Your Details
how_we_work.description: Fill out our quick contact form or give us a call with your details.

how_we_work.title: We'll Call to Discuss
how_we_work.description: We'll get back to you to understand exactly what you need.

how_we_work.title: Receive Your Quote
how_we_work.description: You'll get a clear, upfront quote — no surprises, no hidden fees.

how_we_work.title: We Get to Work
how_we_work.description: Once you give us the go-ahead, we'll schedule and complete the job.

demo_reviews.text: Called Buzz Electrical for a switchboard upgrade and they were fantastic. Arrived on time, explained everything clearly, and left the place spotless. Highly recommend.
demo_reviews.name: Mark T.

demo_reviews.text: Had an emergency power outage at 9pm on a Saturday. Buzz Electrical answered the phone and had someone at our door within the hour. Absolute legends.
demo_reviews.name: Sarah L.

demo_reviews.text: We've used Buzz Electrical for all our office electrical work. Professional, reliable, and their pricing is always fair. Wouldn't go anywhere else.
demo_reviews.name: David R.

image_prompts.hero: A professional Australian electrician in clean navy work uniform installing a modern light fixture in a bright contemporary Australian home, natural daylight, shot from a low angle showing skilled hands at work, photorealistic, high quality
image_prompts.service_1: Professional modern LED downlights installed in a clean white Australian home ceiling, warm lighting glow, interior photography style, no people
image_prompts.service_2: A modern residential electrical switchboard with neat wiring and safety switches, Australian standard, clean professional installation, close-up detail shot
image_prompts.service_3: An electrician using a multimeter to test a powerpoint in an Australian home, focus on hands and equipment, professional and safe, photorealistic
image_prompts.service_4: Emergency electrical repair scene in an Australian home at night, focus on tools and torch light, dramatic but professional, no faces visible
image_prompts.service_5: A modern white ceiling fan installed in a bright Australian living room, clean interior design, natural light, lifestyle photography style
image_prompts.service_6: A modern interconnected smoke alarm installed on a white ceiling in an Australian home, clean and simple composition, close-up product shot
image_prompts.service_7: Modern commercial office space in Australia with professional electrical fit-out, LED panel lighting, clean workstations, wide angle interior shot
image_prompts.service_8: A split system air conditioning unit installed on a white wall in a modern Australian living room, clean and minimal, interior photography
image_prompts.service_9: Industrial 3 phase power switchboard in an Australian workshop, heavy duty electrical equipment, professional installation, detail shot of wiring
